summary: GitHub integration + MCP server complete. OAuth flow, repo linking, embedding service, codebase explorer with semantic retrieval, and 3-tool MCP server implemented. Pipeline integrates explore context and intent drift gate.
entry_conditions_met: Phase 1b handoff exists with all_passed: true
warnings: Embedding model loads on first use (~5s cold start)
MCP server runs standalone via python -m app.mcp_server (not auto-started by main app)
Coverage dropped from 91% (Phase 1b) to 81% due to new GitHub/MCP code with low router coverage (github_repos.py at 36%, github_auth.py at 54%, mcp_models.py at 0%)

critical_interfaces: CodebaseExplorer(prompt_loader, github_client, embedding_service, provider).explore(raw_prompt, repo, branch, token) -> str | None
EmbeddingService().embed_single(text) -> np.ndarray, cosine_search(query, corpus, top_k) -> [(idx, score)]
known_limitations: MCP server not auto-started by init.sh (Phase 5)
No background reindex on push (would need webhook)
Embedding model loads on first use (cold start)
Intent drift gate depends on embedding model availability
